description_long: This is a rectangular, Tetra Pak-style carton labeled as 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY Paradise pineapple' with a vibrant, tropical design. The front features a large, detailed image of a pineapple and pineapple slices, along with water splash graphics and a 'Premium Quality' badge. The sides display nutritional information, a barcode, and multilingual product details, while the back is covered with additional text and regulatory symbols. The carton is predominantly white and gray with blue, yellow, and green accents, and the top is sealed with a folded, pointed spout. The packaging appears to be made of laminated paperboard with a glossy finish, and the cap is integrated into the folded spout rather than a separate plastic piece. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for single-serve use.
description: A rectangular Tetra Pak-style carton of pineapple-flavored bottled water with vibrant fruit imagery, blue and white branding, and a folded spout top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the folded spout, water splash graphics, and certification symbols.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main 'Paradise pineapple' branding, pineapple imagery, and product highlights.
description_view_2: Side view with a visible barcode, part of the pineapple image, and some product information.
description_view_3: Back view covered with nutritional facts, multilingual text, and regulatory details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' in red and gray, 'Paradise pineapple' in large blue and white letters, a 'Premium Quality' green badge, and a realistic pineapple image. Sides and back have nutritional facts, barcode, recycling and certification symbols, and multilingual product information in small fonts.
attribute_cap_type: Folded spout closure, integrated into the carton top, gray in color, with no separate plastic cap visible.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, pointed, and folded spout design with no visible threads or ridges; the spout is part of the carton and not a separate neck.
